response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is currently in a career gap with no recent professional work (Oct 2025–present), and their most recent role ended just months ago, raising concerns about availability and relevance. Their stack is heavily weighted toward DLang and niche tools, with only superficial mention of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL — the core requirements. Additionally, German language proficiency is basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (GISCollective, CI/CD setups)
Proven ability to learn and adapt across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: Current career gap with no recent employment since Oct 2025
Lack of demonstrated experience with required stack (Nest.js, PostgreSQL, React)
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
